type.description: Declares this step as a map (iteration) step

items.description: Source array to iterate over. Typically a '$ref:N' reference to a previous step that produced an array.

operation.description: Fully-qualified CAD operation identifier (e.g. 'occt.shapes.solid.createSphere'). Supports OCCT, Manifold, JSCAD, and vector/math operations.

params.description: Operation parameters. Use '$ref:N' (e.g. '$ref:0') to reference the output of a previous step by its zero-based index. Use '$file:N' to reference an input file's contents.

output.description: When true, this step's result is included in a separate result.json output alongside any shape files.

items.description: A single step in a sequential CAD pipeline. Steps can reference outputs of earlier steps via $ref or input files via $file.
items.title: PipelineStep

steps.description: Sub-steps to execute for each item. Use '$item' for the current element, '$index' for the iteration number.

reduce.description: Optional sub-steps to combine map results. Use '$mapResult' to reference the collected array of iteration outputs.

operation.description: Fully-qualified CAD operation identifier (e.g. 'occt.shapes.solid.createSphere'). Supports OCCT, Manifold, JSCAD, and vector/math operations.

params.description: Operation parameters. Use '$ref:N' (e.g. '$ref:0') to reference the output of a previous step by its zero-based index. Use '$file:N' to reference an input file's contents.

output.description: When true, this step's result is included in a separate result.json output alongside any shape files.

items.description: A single step in a sequential CAD pipeline. Steps can reference outputs of earlier steps via $ref or input files via $file.
items.title: PipelineStep

anyOf.description: Iterate over an array, executing sub-steps for each element. Produces an array of results (or a reduced value).
anyOf.title: MapStep

type.description: Declares this step as a choice (conditional) step

value.description: Value to compare. Typically a '$ref:N' reference to a previous step result.

operator.description: Comparison operator to apply between value and compareTo
operator.title: ComparisonOperator

compareTo.description: Value to compare against. Not required for 'exists' operator.

operation.description: Fully-qualified CAD operation identifier (e.g. 'occt.shapes.solid.createSphere'). Supports OCCT, Manifold, JSCAD, and vector/math operations.

params.description: Operation parameters. Use '$ref:N' (e.g. '$ref:0') to reference the output of a previous step by its zero-based index. Use '$file:N' to reference an input file's contents.

output.description: When true, this step's result is included in a separate result.json output alongside any shape files.

items.description: A single step in a sequential CAD pipeline. Steps can reference outputs of earlier steps via $ref or input files via $file.
items.title: PipelineStep

then.description: Sub-steps to execute when condition is true

else.description: Sub-steps to execute when condition is false. If omitted, produces null.

operation.description: Fully-qualified CAD operation identifier (e.g. 'occt.shapes.solid.createSphere'). Supports OCCT, Manifold, JSCAD, and vector/math operations.

params.description: Operation parameters. Use '$ref:N' (e.g. '$ref:0') to reference the output of a previous step by its zero-based index. Use '$file:N' to reference an input file's contents.

output.description: When true, this step's result is included in a separate result.json output alongside any shape files.

items.description: A single step in a sequential CAD pipeline. Steps can reference outputs of earlier steps via $ref or input files via $file.
items.title: PipelineStep

anyOf.description: Conditional execution — evaluate a condition and run the matching branch.
anyOf.title: ChoiceStep

operation.description: Fully-qualified CAD operation identifier (e.g. 'occt.shapes.solid.createSphere'). Supports OCCT, Manifold, JSCAD, and vector/math operations.

params.description: Operation parameters. Use '$ref:N' (e.g. '$ref:0') to reference the output of a previous step by its zero-based index. Use '$file:N' to reference an input file's contents.

output.description: When true, this step's result is included in a separate result.json output alongside any shape files.

anyOf.description: A single step in a sequential CAD pipeline. Steps can reference outputs of earlier steps via $ref or input files via $file.
anyOf.title: PipelineStep

items.description: A pipeline step — either a plain operation, a map (iteration), or a choice (conditional).
items.title: PipelineAnyStep

steps.description: Ordered list of CAD operations executed sequentially. Later steps can reference earlier results using '$ref:N' syntax. Supports map and choice control-flow steps.

inputFiles.description: References to previously uploaded files. Use '$file:N' in step params to inject file contents.

fileId.description: ID of a previously uploaded file (from POST /files/upload)

items.description: Reference to an uploaded file to be used as input
items.title: InputFileItem

outputs.description: Output format options applied to the final pipeline result. Supports json, csv, stl, 3mf in addition to standard formats. If omitted, raw result data is stored.

items.description: Pipeline output file format. Includes all standard formats plus: 'json' (JSON data), 'csv' (CSV text), 'stl' (binary STL mesh — Manifold/JSCAD only), '3mf' (3MF mesh package — Manifold/JSCAD only).
items.title: PipelineOutputFormat

formats.description: Output formats to generate. Supports standard CAD formats (step, stpz, gltf, decomposed-mesh) plus pipeline-specific formats (json, csv, stl, 3mf).

meshPrecision.description: Tessellation precision for mesh-based outputs (decomposed-mesh and gltf). Lower values produce denser meshes.
meshPrecision.title: MeshPrecision

gltfMeshPrecision.description: Override tessellation precision specifically for glTF output. When set, takes precedence over meshPrecision for glTF only.
gltfMeshPrecision.title: MeshPrecision

adjustYtoZ.description: Convert from Y-up to Z-up coordinate system in the output. Useful for software that expects Z-up.

includePipelineInMetadata.description: Include the full pipeline definition in metadata.json. Defaults to true. Set to false to exclude it for smaller metadata.

outputs.title: PipelineOutputOptions

schema.description: Execute a chain of Bitbybit CAD operations sequentially. Supports $ref:N step references, $file:N file inputs, map iteration, and choice conditionals.
schema.title: PipelineBody
